question: Does the appreciation model generalize beyond the qualities it was trained on?

zero_shot_to_never_trained_qualities.setup: Hold qualities out of TRAINING; test whether the model can produce a valid appreciation for them (--holdout).

attempts.name: word tokenizer, seed only
attempts.why: Held-out word embeddings get no gradient, so a tied-embedding model can't emit them; it substitutes a trained quality.

attempts.name: word + vocabulary warm-up
attempts.why: Growing the embeddings wasn't enough; no copy head formed.

attempts.name: char tokenizer (qualities emittable from known chars)
attempts.why: Fixed emittability (perfect in-distribution) but still no copy head — for an unseen quality it emits a TRAINED quality or a plausible non-word, generating from its learned quality distribution rather than copying the cue.

attempts.name: char tokenizer + COPY-AUGMENTATION (8k nonce-quality samples that can't be memorized)
attempts.why: WORKED. Forcing the model to copy meaningless nonce strings from cue to answer INDUCED the copy head. Zero-shot generalization to never-trained qualities went 0% -> 53%: short held-out qualities are copied verbatim into valid appreciations (wit -> 'your wit got us unstuck', wisdom -> 'your wisdom made the review smoother', zest, vigor, wonder, vibrancy). The ~47% misses are char-copy errors on longer words (vision -> 'visisju', tenacity -> 'teacnci').

zero_shot_to_never_trained_qualities.result: 0% -> 53% zero-shot held-out validity via copy-augmentation. The copy head genuinely formed (verified by eyeballing fresh held-out qualities). The remaining gap is imperfect character copying on longer words, which more scale / a real pointer mechanism would tighten.
zero_shot_to_never_trained_qualities.honest_conclusion: Zero-shot generalization is achievable for this tiny model after all — not by tokenizer alone, but by copy-augmentation that forces a copy head. Earlier 'architectural limit, 0%' conclusion was incomplete; corrected here with the measured 53%.

coverage_generalization.setup: Train on a large, diverse quality vocabulary so every quality the model is asked about is trained.
coverage_generalization.why: 229 vetted qualities -> the shipped model generalizes across a 10x larger space; all produce valid, wholesome appreciation. This is the production approach (word tokenizer).

note: Measured, not claimed. The shipped model erosolar-v0.01 is the word-tokenizer 229-quality model (best for KNOWN qualities, judge 0.94). The char + copy-augmentation model (reproducible via `honest_pipeline.py --tokenizer char --copy-aug 8000 --holdout N`) demonstrates ~53% zero-shot to NOVEL qualities. Two models, two use-cases. Neither is a capability-class claim.
